tasks.subject: Task 0: Types & Presets — Schema foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define ZCustomField, ZCustomFieldOption, preset lists, normalizer utility, and extend ZSurveyContactInfoElement schema.

**Files:**
- Create: `packages/types/surveys/contact-field-presets.ts`
- Modify: `packages/types/surveys/elements.ts`
- Modify: `packages/types/surveys/compound-fields.ts`
- Modify: `packages/types/surveys/types.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/types/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/types/surveys/contact-field-presets.ts", "packages/types/surveys/elements.ts", "packages/types/surveys/compound-fields.ts", "packages/types/surveys/types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/types/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ZCustomField schema defined", "presets file created", "normalizer utility exported", "schema validation updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: FormField dropdown support in survey-ui
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend FormField component to render dropdown fields using SingleSelect.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/survey-ui/src/components/elements/form-field.tsx`

**Verify:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/survey-ui/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/survey-ui/src/components/elements/form-field.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/survey-ui/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FormFieldConfig has options array", "dropdown fields render SingleSelect", "existing fields unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Survey renderer — dynamic fields & object responses
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update ContactInfoElement for fieldOrder iteration, custom field resolution, dropdown rendering, object response format.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/surveys/src/components/elements/contact-info-element.tsx`

**Verify:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/surveys/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/surveys/src/components/elements/contact-info-element.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/surveys/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fieldOrder iteration works", "custom fields resolved", "dropdown rendering works", "object response format", "array backward compat"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Editor UI — CustomFieldsSection component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build editor UI for managing custom fields and field ordering.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/web/modules/survey/editor/components/custom-fields-section.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/web/modules/survey/editor/components/contact-info-element-form.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/web/modules/survey/lib/elements.tsx`

**Verify:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/modules/survey/editor/components/custom-fields-section.tsx", "apps/web/modules/survey/editor/components/contact-info-element-form.tsx", "apps/web/modules/survey/lib/elements.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["custom fields section renders", "add/remove fields works", "dropdown presets work", "field order reorder works", "count badge shows", "max 10 enforced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Editor validation — custom fields i18n & visibility
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update editor validation for custom field placeholders and visibility rules.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/web/modules/survey/editor/lib/validation.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/modules/survey/editor/lib/validation.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["custom field placeholders validated for i18n", "visibility check includes custom fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Backward compat — response normalizer across all consumers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all response-reading code to use normalizeContactInfoResponse and handle custom fields.

**Files:**
- Modify: `RenderResponse.tsx`
- Modify: `surveySummary.ts`
- Modify: `transform.ts`
- Modify: `compound-prefill.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && pnpm tsc --noEmit -p packages/surveys/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/modules/analysis/components/SingleResponseCard/components/RenderResponse.tsx", "apps/web/app/(app)/environments/[environmentId]/surveys/[surveyId]/(analysis)/summary/lib/surveySummary.ts", "apps/web/app/(app)/environments/[environmentId]/surveys/[surveyId]/(analysis)/summary/lib/survey-export/transform.ts", "packages/surveys/src/lib/compound-prefill.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RenderResponse handles both formats", "survey summary handles both", "exports include custom fields", "prefill supports custom fields"]}
```
